stemHtml: Which option gives the correct definition of hard law and soft law?

options.a: Hard laws are legal obligations while soft laws only provide more details about the hard laws.
options.b: Hard laws are applied by force to the operators whereas it is a choice to comply with soft laws or not.
options.c: Soft laws are the latest features fly-by-wire aircraft need to be fitted with, whereas hard laws refer mainly to mechanically driven flight controls.
options.d: Hard laws can contain documents such as certification specifications and guidance material, while soft laws contain regulations and implementing rules.
